title: Kimi ni Todoke: From Me to You
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (25) + S2 (12, eps 26-37) + S3 (Netflix ONA, 5 eps, eps 38-42) = 42 total. (AniList lists S2 at 13 eps incl. a recap; the broadcast/streaming season is 12.) Paired with Karuho Shiina's complete manga: 123 numbered story chapters across 30 volumes; AniList counts 127 incl. ~4 bonus/omake chapters, so the tail extends to 127. Season-end boundaries (ch 27 / 46 / 75) corroborated across episode-to-chapter guides; the internal S1 split is approximate.

mappings.arc: New Couple / School Trip / First Kiss (S3)
Third Year & Graduation (unadapted tail; ch 124-127 are bonus chapters)
